description:
EIM GUI: Cross-Platform ESP-IDF Installation Manager

- EIM-767: Fixing nightly notification for pkg manager tests by @alirana01 in #762

- fix missing text on button by @Hahihula in #768
- Eim-762: add pacman support by @Hahihula in #761
